name: testkit
description: Mor's AI test-automation toolkit. One declarative pipeline (understand → cases → scenarios → script → run/self-heal → CI) with pluggable target profiles (web-playwright, web-from-docs, web-blackbox, desktop-pyside6). Agent writes & maintains tests; Playwright/pytest runs them. Built for testers. Runs on Claude Code (enforced gates) and Cursor (advisory).
